  • Module code
  • src.crud.tenant_product

Source code for src.crud.tenant_product

from fastapi import HTTPException, status
from sqlalchemy import func
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from src.models.inventory import InventoryItem
from src.models.product import Product
from src.models.tenant_product import TenantProduct
from src.schemas.tenant_product import (
    BulkAddTenantProductsCreate,
    BulkAddTenantProductsResponse,
    TenantProductCreate,
    TenantProductUpdate,
)




[docs]
def get_tenant_product(db: Session, tenant_product_id: str) -> TenantProduct | None:
    return (
        db.query(TenantProduct)
        .filter(TenantProduct.id == tenant_product_id)
        .first()
    )






[docs]
def get_tenant_products(
    db: Session,
    tenant_id: str,
    location_id: str | None = None,
    skip: int = 0,
    limit: int = 200,
) -> list[TenantProduct]:
    query = db.query(TenantProduct).filter(TenantProduct.tenant_id == tenant_id)
    if location_id:
        query = query.join(
            InventoryItem, InventoryItem.tenant_product_id == TenantProduct.id
        ).filter(InventoryItem.location_id == location_id)
    return query.offset(skip).limit(limit).all()






[docs]
def get_enabled_tenant_products(
    db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None
) -> list[TenantProduct]:
    query = db.query(TenantProduct).filter(
        TenantProduct.tenant_id == tenant_id, TenantProduct.is_enabled == True  # noqa: E712
    )
    if location_id:
        query = query.join(
            InventoryItem, InventoryItem.tenant_product_id == TenantProduct.id
        ).filter(InventoryItem.location_id == location_id)
    return query.all()




def _get_tenant_product_by_global_product(
    db: Session, tenant_id: str, product_id: str
) -> TenantProduct | None:
    return (
        db.query(TenantProduct)
        .filter(
            TenantProduct.tenant_id == tenant_id,
            TenantProduct.product_id == product_id,
        )
        .first()
    )


def _add_inventory_for_tenant_product(
    db: Session,
    tp: TenantProduct,
    location_id: str,
    on_hand_qty: float | None,
    reorder_level_qty: float | None,
) -> None:
    from src.crud.inventory import get_inventory_item_by_location_product

    if get_inventory_item_by_location_product(db, location_id, tp.id):
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
            detail="Inventory item already exists for this location and product",
        )
    db.add(
        InventoryItem(
            tenant_id=tp.tenant_id,
            location_id=location_id,
            tenant_product_id=tp.id,
            on_hand_qty=on_hand_qty if on_hand_qty is not None else 0,
            reorder_level_qty=reorder_level_qty,
            preferred_stock_qty=tp.preferred_stock_qty,
        )
    )




[docs]
def create_tenant_product(db: Session, data: TenantProductCreate) -> TenantProduct:
    if _get_tenant_product_by_global_product(db, data.tenant_id, data.product_id):
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
            detail="Product is already in this salon catalog",
        )

    payload = data.model_dump()
    location_id = payload.pop("location_id", None)
    on_hand_qty = payload.pop("on_hand_qty", None)
    reorder_level_qty = payload.pop("reorder_level_qty", None)

    tp = TenantProduct(**payload)
    db.add(tp)
    db.flush()

    if location_id:
        _add_inventory_for_tenant_product(
            db, tp, location_id, on_hand_qty, reorder_level_qty
        )

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tp)
    return tp






[docs]
def bulk_create_tenant_products(
    db: Session, data: BulkAddTenantProductsCreate
) -> BulkAddTenantProductsResponse:
    product_ids = [entry.product_id for entry in data.products]
    found_ids = {
        row[0]
        for row in db.query(Product.id).filter(Product.id.in_(product_ids)).all()
    }
    missing = [pid for pid in product_ids if pid not in found_ids]
    if missing:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail=f"Global product(s) not found: {', '.join(missing[:5])}"
            + ("…" if len(missing) > 5 else ""),
        )

    shared = data.model_dump(exclude={"products", "tenant_id"})
    location_id = shared.pop("location_id", None)
    on_hand_qty = shared.pop("on_hand_qty", None)
    reorder_level_qty = shared.pop("reorder_level_qty", None)

    created: list[TenantProduct] = []
    for entry in data.products:
        if _get_tenant_product_by_global_product(db, data.tenant_id, entry.product_id):
            continue

        row = {**shared, "tenant_id": data.tenant_id, "product_id": entry.product_id}
        if entry.custom_name is not None:
            row["custom_name"] = entry.custom_name

        tp = TenantProduct(**row)
        db.add(tp)
        db.flush()

        if location_id:
            _add_inventory_for_tenant_product(
                db, tp, location_id, on_hand_qty, reorder_level_qty
            )
        created.append(tp)

    if not created:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
            detail="All selected products are already in this salon catalog",
        )

    db.commit()
    for tp in created:
        db.refresh(tp)

    return BulkAddTenantProductsResponse(
        items=created,
        created_count=len(created),
    )






[docs]
def update_tenant_product(
    db: Session, tenant_product_id: str, data: TenantProductUpdate
) -> TenantProduct | None:
    tp = get_tenant_product(db, tenant_product_id)
    if not tp:
        return None
    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_none=True).items():
        setattr(tp, field, value)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tp)
    return tp






[docs]
def delete_tenant_product(db: Session, tenant_product_id: str) -> bool:
    tp = get_tenant_product(db, tenant_product_id)
    if not tp:
        return False
    db.delete(tp)
    db.commit()
    return True






[docs]
def count_tenant_products(
    db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None
) -> int:
    query = db.query(func.count(TenantProduct.id)).filter(TenantProduct.tenant_id == tenant_id)
    if location_id:
        query = query.join(
            InventoryItem, InventoryItem.tenant_product_id == TenantProduct.id
        ).filter(InventoryItem.location_id == location_id)
    return query.scalar() or 0






[docs]
def count_enabled_tenant_products(
    db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None
) -> int:
    query = db.query(func.count(TenantProduct.id)).filter(
        TenantProduct.tenant_id == tenant_id,
        TenantProduct.is_enabled == True,  # noqa: E712
    )
    if location_id:
        query = query.join(
            InventoryItem, InventoryItem.tenant_product_id == TenantProduct.id
        ).filter(InventoryItem.location_id == location_id)
    return query.scalar() or 0
